description_long: This is a large, wooden storage crate constructed from vertical planks with visible wood grain and knots, reinforced by diagonal and horizontal wooden beams. The crate features a prominent yellow and black radioactive warning symbol on its top and one side, indicating it is used for storing hazardous or sensitive materials. The wood appears weathered, giving the box a rugged, utilitarian look suitable for industrial or urban environments. The crate is solidly built, with no visible handles or locks, and the lid seems to be a simple flat cover that fits snugly on top. There are no windows or openings, and the overall construction suggests durability and security. The warning signage is the only marking, with no other labels or decorative elements present.
description: A large, weathered wooden crate with diagonal reinforcements and prominent radioactive warning signs on the top and one side, designed for secure storage of hazardous materials.
description_view_0: The front view shows the wooden planks, diagonal reinforcement, and the radioactive warning sign on the top.
description_view_1: This side view is similar to the front but without the radioactive symbol on the visible side, only on the top.
description_view_2: This view highlights the side with the large radioactive warning symbol and the top warning sign, making the hazard signage most prominent.
description_view_3: This view shows the crate from another side, with the warning sign only visible on the top and no signage on the visible side.
